title: Authentication failed due to expired JWT
root_cause: JWT access token expired before API request execution.
resolution: Refresh the access token before executing authenticated API requests.

title: Database connection timeout
failure_summary: Application timed out while connecting to PostgreSQL.
root_cause: Database service was unavailable during deployment.
resolution: Wait for database readiness before running integration tests.

title: Playwright locator no longer matches
failure_summary: Playwright could not locate the Checkout button.
root_cause: Frontend changed button text from 'Checkout' to 'Proceed to Payment'.
resolution: Replace text locator with a stable data-testid locator.

title: Redis cache unavailable
resolution: Restart Redis container and configure health checks.

title: API rate limit exceeded
failure_summary: API returned HTTP 429 Too Many Requests.
root_cause: Load test exceeded configured rate limit.
resolution: Throttle request rate or increase API rate limit.

title: Schema migration mismatch
root_cause: Latest migration was not applied before running tests.
resolution: Execute migration scripts as part of deployment pipeline.

title: S3 upload permission denied
failure_summary: AWS returned AccessDenied while uploading object.
resolution: Grant s3:PutObject permission to deployment role.

title: Message queue processing delayed
failure_summary: Consumer did not receive message within timeout.
root_cause: RabbitMQ queue accumulated a large backlog.
resolution: Scale consumer instances and purge stale messages.

title: DNS resolution failure
resolution: Retry request with exponential backoff and monitor DNS health.

title: Disk space exhausted
failure_summary: Application failed to write log files.
root_cause: Build agent ran out of disk space.
resolution: Clean old artifacts and configure automatic log rotation.
